plan.title: Add read-only runtime capability probe for worker environments

narratives.Description: Local workers can execute in different runtime envelopes even on the same machine, so parent-shell assumptions are not enough. This story adds a read-only diagnostic probe that classifies local unsandboxed, Cursor native sandbox, and cloud/headless-like execution without treating sandbox-remapped UID 0 as real root.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Add the scripts/platform_capabilities.py file to inspect environment variables, /proc/self/uid_map, user identity, and basic filesystem ownership interpretation without mutating project state.
2. Add pytest verification evidence in tests/cli/test_platform_capabilities.py for local-unsandboxed, cursor-native-sandbox UID remap, and cloud/headless-like missing-local-context cases.
narratives.UserStory: As a swarm orchestrator, I want a runtime capability probe, so that worker dispatch decisions are based on the environment that will actually run the work.
narratives.Traces: Issue #1557 decomposition recommendation item 1; issue #1557 Cursor native sandbox comment.

narrative.Acceptance: Given environment variables and platform files are available, when the probe runs, then it emits a structured runtime_mode such as local-unsandboxed, cursor-native-sandbox, or cloud-headless.

items.title: Cursor sandbox UID remap is interpreted safely

narrative.Acceptance: Given /proc/self/uid_map maps sandbox UID 0 to CURSOR_ORIG_UID, when the probe reports identity, then it identifies sandbox-remapped local user execution rather than real-root execution.
narrative.Traces: Issue #1557 suggested AC for Cursor native sandbox mode.

narrative.Acceptance: Given the runtime probe runs in a worker environment, then it reads environment and identity facts without writing credentials, changing GitHub auth state, or mutating vBRIEF lifecycle files.

expected_outputs: runtime capability tests classify unsandboxed, Cursor sandbox remap, and cloud/headless-like execution

references.title: Issue #1557: swarm: make GitHub credential policy runtime-aware for local agents
